chunks.title: Complaint about the loss of faithfulness
chunks.reason: The psalmist introduces the crisis where the faithful have vanished and people speak with double hearts.

chunks.title: Prayer against flattering lips
chunks.reason: A direct petition for God to cut off the arrogant speech of the wicked.

chunks.title: God's promise to arise and preserve His words
chunks.reason: Yahweh responds to the affliction by promising to save the needy and guard His pure words.

chunks.title: Observation of wickedness
chunks.reason: A concluding statement describing the current state where the wicked walk about and vileness is exalted.
